# Evaluation Snapshot
## Prompt
Make a tiny local edit in a file where the boundary is already obvious and no context confusion exists.
## Expected selection
do_not_use
## Why
The change is tiny and fully local, so there is no need to map domains or resolve a confusing boundary.
## Expected object
A deflection toward the simpler local-edit path, with no attempt to invent a context map.
## Boundary notes
Do not use this skill when the boundary is already clear and no semantic overlap needs resolution.
## Verification hooks
The response should avoid domain mapping language and should not pretend the edit needs a broader boundary analysis.
